author: anon-13168fa2
content: Plan: Add brief security callouts to earlier chapters so the habits are seeded before the full Security chapter in Phase 3. Targets: (1) Phase 1 first build - when setting up local storage, mention validating input before storing it and not trusting data you read back without checking. (2) Phase 2 issue tracker - when building the Rust CLI, mention never hardcoding secrets and validating CLI input. (3) Phase 3 APIs chapter - already covers secrets well, just needs a forward reference to the security chapter. Light touch in each - a paragraph or a callout box, not a full section. The Security chapter stays as the deep dive.
